Liu Kongci еҠүеӯ”ж…Ҳ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Kongci (еҠүеӯ”ж…Ҳ). Skilled at speaking quickly. He and Wang Zifa were favorites of Kong Rong. Liu Kongci was affiliated with Kong Rong.
